title: ophrys carmeli subsp. rhodia
intro: Ophrys carmeli subsp. rhodia, also known as the Rhodian bee orchid, is a type of orchid species belonging to the Ophrys genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ophrys carmeli subsp. rhodia include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal remedy.
